title: 宝塚記念の後に・ミラ、ようやく

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
An intense race against T.M. Opera O, Narita Top
Road, and Meisho Doto comes to a finish.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: With the competition now behind her, Admire Vega reflects and remembers... racing against rivals is fun.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Later, as we discuss our next move, she reminds
me of her goal to become someone her sister
could be proud of—a goal she wants to achieve
for herself, not anyone else.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She speaks of becoming a first-magnitude star
that shines its light and glory to the furthest
reaches of space. That is her goal.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Which means she'll need to take on a race worthy
of such merit. So, we decide on the autumn Tenno
Sho.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, Admire Vega proceeds forward, not out
of devotion or duty, but for what her heart and
legs want.
